name: Gluten Free Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Arrowhead Mills Rice or Millet Flour
1 tbsp Arrowhead Mills Non-alum Baking Powder
2 tbsp Arrowhead Mills Unrefined Vegetable Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all the dry ingredients: rice or millet flour, soy flour, corn meal, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the egg, water, and vegetable oil until well combined.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredient mixture and stir until just combined (no lumps).
4. Heat a preheated griddle or large skillet to 350°F to 375°F.
5. Using a ladle or measuring cup, pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot griddle for each pancake.
6. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and edges start to look dry (about 2-3 minutes).
7. Flip the pancakes carefully with a spatula and cook for another 1-2 minutes on the other side, or until golden brown.
8. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "Recipes for Special Dietary Needs" tri-fold Reprinted by permission of Arrowhead Mills, Inc. Electronic format courtesy of: Karen Mintzias
